message:
bd-3bxhj.4.7: Codegen optimization passes and tracing test parallelism fixes

Add codegen_optimize module (913 lines) implementing five semantics-preserving
post-generation optimization passes for emitted Rust code: dead branch
elimination, style constant folding, helper extraction, import deduplication,
and whitespace normalization. Each pass emits traceable before/after decision
records for audit.

Fix tracing test flakiness across six test files by:
- Adding ensure_global_trace_level() with Once-guarded global subscriber
  initialization so callsite interest is correctly registered
- Rebuilding interest cache inside with_default scopes to ensure DEBUG
  instrumentation remains observable under parallel test runs
- Replacing racy global state access in voi_telemetry tests with direct
  RwLock guard manipulation under a test mutex

Issue tracking: bd-3bxhj.4.8 closed (done), bd-3bxhj.4.7 now in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
